allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d.get\(k,{}\) for k in ['dependencies','devDependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'key' in k.lower\(\) or 'role' in k.lower\(\) or 'jwt' in k.lower\(\)]")
